name: Tronox Pigmentos do Brasil S.A.
summary: Tronox Pigmentos do Brasil S.A. produces and sells titanium dioxide (TiO2) pigments worldwide. Its TiO2 pigments are used to provide color, brightness, and opacity to a range of products, including paint, plastics, paper, rubber, ceramics, and other products, as well as applications, such as paper, glass, leather, synthetic fibers, and color formulations for artistic paints. The company markets its TiO2 product under the TiONA name. It also produces ilmenite, zirconite, rutile, and kyanite. The company was founded in 1969 and is based in Cama√É¬ßari, Brazil.
